e.p: Can you clean my room, please?
e.m: Nói bạn có cần dọn phòng hay không. Nói khi bạn cần (ví dụ: now/tomorrow morning).
e.h: Use 'I need / I want + my room + past participle' and time (now/tomorrow).
e.s: I need my room cleaned now. Please come this morning.

e.p: Do you want housekeeping today?
e.m: Trả lời có hoặc không. Nói giờ bạn muốn dọn (ví dụ: at 3 pm).
e.h: Start with 'Yes, please' or 'No, thank you.' Then 'I want + housekeeping + at + time.'
e.s: Yes, please. I want housekeeping at 3 pm.

e.p: How often do you want cleaning?
e.m: Nói tần suất (always/often/sometimes). Nói lý do ngắn (ví dụ: room is messy / I am busy).
e.h: Use an adverb of frequency and a short reason ('because' optional).
e.s: I usually want cleaning every day. I am busy.

e.p: The cleaner will come in 10 minutes. Is that OK?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc từ chối việc này. Nếu từ chối, đề nghị thời gian khác.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + short time proposal (in an hour, later).
e.s: No, not now. Please come in an hour.

e.p: We need your permission to enter your room.
e.m: Cho biết bạn cho phép hay không. Nói lý do ngắn nếu không cho phép (ví dụ: sleeping).
e.h: Use 'You can / You cannot enter' and a short reason.
e.s: You can enter now. I am not in the room.

e.p: Can you change the bed sheets?
e.m: Trả lời có hoặc không. Nói khi bạn muốn họ thay (now/tomorrow).
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' or 'No, thank you' and 'I want you to + V'.
e.s: Yes, please. I want you to change them now.

e.p: Are the sheets dirty?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói lý do ngắn nếu bẩn (ví dụ: I spilled coffee).
e.h: Use 'Yes, they are' or 'No, they are not' and short reason.
e.s: Yes, they are dirty. I spilled coffee.

e.p: Do you want fresh sheets every day?
e.m: Nói tần suất bạn muốn (every day/sometimes). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I usually / I want' + frequency and short reason.
e.s: I usually want clean sheets every two days. My bed gets dirty.

e.p: We can change sheets now or after lunch. Which do you prefer?
e.m: Chọn now hoặc after lunch. Nói lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn.
e.h: Use 'Please change now' or 'Please change after lunch' and a reason.
e.s: Please change them after lunch. I will go out now.

e.p: We ran out of extra sheets. Can you wait until tomorrow?
e.m: Cho biết bạn có thể chờ không. Nói khi bạn muốn nếu chờ (tomorrow morning).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I can wait' or 'No, I cannot wait' and a time.
e.s: No, I cannot wait. I want them tomorrow morning.

e.p: The shower is not working. Do you want maintenance?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn sửa. Nói lúc bạn có thể để họ vào phòng.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I can / I cannot' + time.
e.s: Yes, please fix it. I can be in the room at 2 pm.

e.p: Is the tap leaking?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Mô tả ngắn chỗ rò (sink/shower).
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' or 'No, it is not' and location 'in the sink'.
e.s: Yes, it is leaking. The tap is in the bathroom sink.

e.p: Do you need hot water now?
e.m: Nói bạn cần nước nóng hay không. Nói bạn có sử dụng bồn tắm hay vòi sen.
e.h: Use 'I need / I don't need' and 'I will use the shower / bath.'
e.s: I need hot water now. I will use the shower.

e.p: We can send a technician today. Is this okay?
e.m: Cho biết có đồng ý hay không. Nếu không, đề nghị thời gian khác.
e.h: Use 'Yes, that's OK' or 'No, please' + time suggestion.
e.s: No, that's not OK. Please send him tomorrow morning.

e.p: The bathroom light is out. Do you want a lamp?
e.m: Nói có muốn đèn tạm hay không. Nói vị trí bạn cần đèn (near the sink/bed).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'near the sink / by the bed'.
e.s: Yes, I want a lamp. Please put it near the sink.

e.p: We are missing towels in your room. Do you need new ones?
e.m: Trả lời bạn có cần khăn mới không. Nói số khăn bạn cần.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I need' or 'No, I do not need' and a number.
e.s: Yes, I need two towels. One for shower and one for hands.

e.p: Do you want bath towels or hand towels?
e.m: Chọn loại khăn bạn muốn. Nói số lượng ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I want + bath towels / hand towels' and number.
e.s: I want two bath towels. I also want one hand towel.

e.p: We can bring towels now or in 30 minutes. What do you prefer?
e.m: Chọn now hoặc in 30 minutes. Nói lý do nếu cần (ví dụ: I am showering).
e.h: Use 'Please bring now' or 'Please bring in 30 minutes' and reason.
e.s: Please bring them now. I am showering soon.

e.p: Are you still missing a towel after housekeeping?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu còn thiếu, nêu bạn cần bao nhiêu.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and a number if yes.
e.s: Yes, I am still missing one towel. I need one more towel.

e.p: Do you want extra clean towels every day?
e.m: Nói tần suất bạn muốn (every day/sometimes). Nói một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I usually want' or 'I want' + frequency and reason.
e.s: I usually want extra towels every day. I like clean towels each morning.

e.p: The light in your room is flickering. Do you see it?
e.m: Xác nhận có nhìn thấy không. Nói bạn có muốn sửa ngay không.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I see it / No, I don't' and 'I want it fixed now.'
e.s: Yes, I see it. I want it fixed now.

e.p: Is the power outlet working in your room?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói vị trí ổ (near bed/desk).
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' or 'No, it is not' and location.
e.s: No, it is not working. The outlet is near the desk.

e.p: Do you want a fan or extra blanket tonight?
e.m: Chọn fan hoặc blanket. Nói lý do (hot/cold).
e.h: Use 'I want a fan / I want an extra blanket' and a reason.
e.s: I want a fan tonight. The room is hot.

e.p: We can turn off the main power for a short time. Is it OK?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc từ chối việc tắt điện. Nếu không, nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, OK' or 'No, not OK' and a short reason.
e.s: No, not OK. I am charging my phone.

e.p: The lamp bulb is broken. Do you want a new bulb now?
e.m: Nói có muốn thay ngay hay muốn chờ. Nếu chờ, nói khi nào.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' or 'No, thank you' and time.
e.s: Yes, please replace it now. I need light to read.

e.p: Is the air conditioning working?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói bạn có muốn bật/tắt không.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'Please turn it on/off'.
e.s: No, it is not working. Please turn it on now.

e.p: The room is too cold. Do you want a heater?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn heater. Nói mức ấm bạn cần (a little/more).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' and 'a little / more warm'.
e.s: Yes, I want a heater. I need it a little warmer.

e.p: Do you like the temperature now?
e.m: Trả lời thích hay không. Nếu không, nói bạn muốn nóng hoặc lạnh hơn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I like it' or 'No, I want it warmer/colder.'
e.s: No, I do not like it. I want it warmer.

e.p: We can set the AC to 24°C. Is that good?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc đề nghị nhiệt độ khác. Nói số nếu thay đổi.
e.h: Use 'Yes, that's good' or 'No, set to + number°C'.
e.s: No, please set it to 26°C. That is better.

e.p: Would you like the window open for fresh air?
e.m: Nói có muốn mở cửa sổ không. Nếu có, nói bạn sẽ đóng khi nào.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I will close it at + time' or 'after a while'.
e.s: Yes, open the window. I will close it in one hour.

e.p: Are you missing any items in your room?
e.m: Nói có thiếu đồ hay không. Nếu có, liệt kê một món chính bạn thiếu.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I am missing' and name one item (towel, remote, soap).
e.s: Yes, I am missing the TV remote. Please bring it.

e.p: Do you need a hair dryer?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, nói bạn cần nó ngay hay sau.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I need' or 'No, I don't need' and time.
e.s: Yes, I need a hair dryer now. Please bring it to my room.

e.p: We can give you a toothbrush kit. Do you want one?
e.m: Chọn có/không. Nói bạn cần kit for one person or more.
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'I don't want' and number (one/two).
e.s: Yes, I want one toothbrush kit. It is for me.

e.p: Is there no soap in the bathroom?
e.m: Xác nhận có hay không. Nếu không có, nói bạn muốn loại soap (liquid/ bar).
e.h: Use 'Yes, there is no' or 'No, there is' and soap type.
e.s: Yes, there is no soap. I want liquid soap.

e.p: Do you want extra hangers in the closet?
e.m: Nói có/không. Nói số lượng bạn cần ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you' and a number.
e.s: Yes, I want three extra hangers. Thank you.

e.p: When do you prefer housekeeping to come?
e.m: Nói lúc bạn thích (morning/afternoon). Nói vì sao chọn giờ đó (ví dụ: I am out).
e.h: Use 'I prefer' + time and a short reason.
e.s: I prefer afternoon. I am out in the morning.

e.p: Can housekeeping come every morning?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói bạn muốn mỗi ngày hay chỉ some days.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please, every day' or 'No, only on + days'.
e.s: No, please only on weekdays. I do not need it on weekends.

e.p: We will clean at 10 am. Is that good for you?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc từ chối. Nếu từ chối, đề nghị giờ khác.
e.h: Use 'Yes, good' or 'No, please' + other time.
e.s: No, please come at 2 pm. I have a meeting at 10 am.

e.p: Do you want privacy sign on the door during cleaning?
e.m: Nói có muốn hay không. Nói lý do ngắn nếu bạn muốn (ví dụ: sleep).
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' or 'No, thank you' and a reason.
e.s: Yes, please put the privacy sign. I like to sleep late.

e.p: Would you like us to clean when you leave the room?
e.m: Nói có muốn dọn khi bạn ra ngoài không. Nói bạn thường ra ngoài vào giờ nào.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' or 'No' and a usual time.
e.s: Yes, please clean when I leave. I usually leave at 9 am.

e.p: There is noise from the next room. Do you hear it?
e.m: Xác nhận bạn có nghe tiếng không. Nói tiếng ồn làm bạn khó chịu hay không.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I hear it' or 'No' and 'It is bothering me' or not.
e.s: Yes, I hear it. It is bothering me.

e.p: Do you want us to call reception about the noise?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn họ gọi. Nói bạn muốn họ làm gì ngắn (ask to be quiet).
e.h: Use 'Yes, please call' or 'No, I will' and action.
e.s: Yes, please call reception. Ask them to be quiet.

e.p: Is the noise loud at night or day?
e.m: Nói time (night/day). Nói một ví dụ ngắn khi bạn nghe (at 11 pm).
e.h: Use 'It is loud at night/day' and a short time.
e.s: It is loud at night. I hear it at 11 pm.

e.p: We can move you to a quiet room. Do you want to move?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bạn muốn chuyển. Nếu có, nói khi bạn muốn chuyển (now/tomorrow).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want to move' or 'No, I will stay' and time.
e.s: Yes, I want to move now. Please help me with my bags.

e.p: Would you like earplugs for sleeping?
e.m: Chọn có/không và nếu có, nói bạn cần 1 hay 2 cặp.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you' and number.
e.s: Yes, I want one pair of earplugs. I sleep lightly.

d.t: Yêu cầu thêm gối và mền

e.p: Do you need an extra pillow?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, nói bạn muốn 1 hay 2 cái.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I need' or 'No, thank you' and a number.
e.s: Yes, I need one extra pillow. Thank you.

e.p: Is the blanket enough for you?
e.m: Trả lời đủ hay không. Nếu không, nói bạn muốn thêm mền hay chăn dày hơn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is enough' or 'No, I want' + item.
e.s: No, it is not enough. I want a thicker blanket.

e.p: We can bring pillows now or later. When do you want them?
e.m: Chọn now hoặc later. Nói lý do ngắn nếu chọn later.
e.h: Use 'Please bring now' or 'Please bring later' and reason.
e.s: Please bring them now. I will sleep soon.

e.p: Do you prefer soft or firm pillow?
e.m: Chọn soft hoặc firm. Nói một lý do ngắn cho sở thích.
e.h: Use 'I prefer soft/firm' and short reason (sleep comfort).
e.s: I prefer a soft pillow. It is more comfortable for me.

e.p: Would you like an extra blanket every night?
e.m: Nói tần suất bạn muốn (every night/sometimes). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I usually want' or 'I want' + frequency and reason.
e.s: I usually want an extra blanket every night. The room is cold.

d.t: Vấn đề với cửa và cửa sổ

e.p: The door does not close well. Do you notice that?
e.m: Xác nhận bạn có thấy không. Nói bạn có muốn sửa ngay không.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I notice' or 'No' and 'Please fix it now.'
e.s: Yes, I notice it. Please fix it now.

e.p: Is the window stuck when you open it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, mô tả ngắn (it is hard to move).
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' or 'No, it is not' and short description.
e.s: Yes, it is stuck. It is hard to move.

e.p: Do you want the lock checked now?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn kiểm tra. Nói bạn có ở trong phòng hay ra ngoài.
e.h: Use 'Yes, check it now' or 'No, check it later' and location.
e.s: Yes, check it now. I am in the room.

e.p: We can close the balcony for safety. Do you agree?
e.m: Cho biết đồng ý hay không. Nói lý do ngắn nếu không đồng ý.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I agree' or 'No, I don't agree' and reason.
e.s: Yes, I agree. The balcony is dangerous for children.

e.p: Would you like curtains replaced because of light?
e.m: Cho biết có muốn thay curtain hay không. Nói bạn muốn darker or lighter curtains.
e.h: Use 'I want' + 'darker / lighter curtains' and short reason.
e.s: Yes, I want darker curtains. The room is too bright in the morning.

d.t: Thanh toán và đồ bị mất

e.p: Did you pay for the minibar items?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu không, nói bạn sẽ trả ngay hay later.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I paid' or 'No, I will pay now/later.'
e.s: No, I did not pay. I will pay now.

e.p: I cannot find my watch. Is it in your room?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, nêu vị trí ngắn gọn (on the bed/desk).
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' or 'No, it is not' and location.
e.s: No, it is not here. I checked on the desk.

e.p: We found a small bag. Is it yours?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu là của bạn, mô tả ngắn màu hoặc vị trí nó nằm.
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is mine' or 'No, it is not' and a short description.
e.s: Yes, it is mine. It is a small black bag.

e.p: Do you want us to check lost and found?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn họ kiểm tra. Nếu có, nói bạn muốn họ gọi bạn khi tìm được.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please check' and 'call me' or 'no, thank you.'
e.s: Yes, please check lost and found. Call me if you find it.

e.p: Would you like a receipt for your room charge?
e.m: Chọn có/không. Nếu có, nói bạn muốn email hay giấy.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' and 'by email / on paper.'
e.s: Yes, I want a receipt by email. Please send it now.

d.t: Ôn tập: Yêu cầu dọn và thay đồ

e.p: Can housekeeping clean my room and change the sheets now?
e.m: Nói bạn có muốn cả dọn và thay ga không. Nói khi bạn muốn họ làm (now/tomorrow).
e.h: Use 'I want / I need' + both actions and time.
e.s: Yes, I want cleaning and sheet change now. Please come this morning.

e.p: Do you want fresh towels and new pillows today?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói số khăn và gối bạn cần.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No' and numbers for items.
e.s: Yes, I want two towels and one pillow. Thank you.

e.p: We will clean at 11 am. Is that OK for sheet change too?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc từ chối. Nếu từ chối, đề nghị giờ khác.
e.h: Use 'Yes, OK' or 'No, please' + other time.
e.s: No, please come at 2 pm. I will be out at 11 am.

e.p: Are your sheets stained or just a little dirty?
e.m: Nói sheets bị bẩn nặng hay nhẹ. Nói bạn muốn thay mỗi ngày hay không.
e.h: Use 'They are stained / a little dirty' and frequency.
e.s: They are a little dirty. I do not want them changed every day.

e.p: Would you like housekeeping to come while you are out?
e.m: Chọn có/không. Nếu có, nói giờ bạn thường đi ra ngoài.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' or 'No' and a usual time.
e.s: Yes, please come while I am out. I usually leave at 9 am.

d.t: Ôn tập: Thiết bị hỏng và thiếu đồ

e.p: The shower has low water pressure. Do you want us to check?
e.m: Nói có/không bạn muốn họ kiểm tra. Nói khi bạn có thể chờ họ (now/tomorrow).
e.h: Use 'Yes, please check' or 'No, please' + time.
e.s: Yes, please check it now. I am in the bathroom.

e.p: My lamp is broken and there is no spare bulb. Can you help?
e.m: Nói bạn có muốn họ mang bóng đèn không. Nói bạn cần lighting for reading hay not.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please bring' and reason (to read).
e.s: Yes, please bring a new bulb. I need light to read.

e.p: We do not have a hair dryer in your room. Do you want one now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, nói bạn cần ngay hay sau.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I need it now' or 'No, later' and time.
e.s: Yes, I need a hair dryer now. Please bring it.

e.p: Is the TV remote missing from your room?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nếu có, nêu bạn muốn chúng tìm ngay hay bạn tự tìm.
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is missing' and 'please find it' or 'I will look'.
e.s: Yes, it is missing. Please check in lost and found.

e.p: Would you like replacement towels and a new soap now?
e.m: Cho biết có muốn thay toàn bộ hay chỉ một món. Nói bạn cần bao nhiêu khăn.
e.h: Use 'I want replacement towels' and a number or 'only soap'.
e.s: I want replacement towels now. Please bring two towels and new soap.

d.t: Ôn tập: Các vấn đề chung trong phòng

e.p: I hear a strange smell in the room. Do you smell it too?
e.m: Xác nhận bạn có ngửi thấy không. Nói bạn muốn họ xử lý ngay hay later.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I smell it' or 'No' and 'please handle now/later'.
e.s: Yes, I smell it. Please handle it now.

e.p: The room is messy after the last guest. Do you want a full clean?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói bạn muốn họ dọn kỹ (full clean) bây giờ hay ngày mai.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want a full clean' and time.
e.s: Yes, I want a full clean now. Please clean the floor and bed.

e.p: There is no hot water and no towels. Which do you want us to fix first?
e.m: Chọn ưu tiên (hot water hoặc towels). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Fix hot water first' or 'Fix towels first' and reason.
e.s: Fix hot water first. I need a shower.

e.p: We can move your booking to another room or give a discount. Which do you prefer?
e.m: Chọn move or discount. Nói lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn.
e.h: Use 'I prefer to move' or 'I prefer a discount' and a reason.
e.s: I prefer to move to a quiet room. I cannot sleep here.

e.p: If we fix small issues now, would you like daily checks?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bạn muốn kiểm tra hàng ngày. Nói một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want daily checks' or 'No, thank you' and reason.
e.s: Yes, I want daily checks. I want everything to work well.
